name: measure-okr-grader
description: Scores completed OKR sets at cycle close with KR-level scoring per the canonical OKR type enum (committed | aspirational | learning | operational_health | compliance_or_safety), committed-vs-aspirational interpretation, evidence quality assessment, learning synthesis, and next-cycle recommendations. Refuses to retroactively change targets or shrink committed scope, average away guardrail KRs, treat 0.7 as success for committed or compliance_or_safety KRs, equate effort with impact, or use scores
author: product-on-purpose
summary_zh: 这是一个OKR周期末评分工具，能根据KR类型严格打分并给出下期建议。它专治复盘时事后改目标、降标准或拿苦劳当功劳等和稀泥做法，确保评分客观真实。
